# CryptoWebBuild Agency

> High-ticket web architecture, custom frontend development, modern UI/UX redesign, strict Speed Optimization, and Technical SEO. We turn slow, outdated websites into lightning-fast, highly authoritative lead-generation machines.

## Business Details
- **Name:** CryptoWebBuild
- **Founder:** Sagor Ahamed (Senior Web3 Developer & Architect)
- **Website:** [https://cryptowebbuild.com](https://cryptowebbuild.com)
- **Contact Email:** [hello@cryptowebbuild.com](mailto:hello@cryptowebbuild.com)

## Target Audience & Niche Focus
- Web3 & Crypto Projects (Token Presales, Meme Coins, DApps, NFT Marketplaces)
- High-Growth E-commerce Stores
- Dental Clinics
- Roofing Contractors
- Real Estate Agencies
- B2B SaaS and Enterprise Startups

## Core Services & Solutions
- **Crypto & Web3 Sites:** Token landing pages, presale flows, custom dApp UIs, wallet integrations, and Moon Math calculators.
- **High-Performance E-commerce:** Headless storefronts, JavaScript carts, and secure payment gateways optimized for sales.
- **Business Websites:** Lead-generation platforms tailored for local businesses and startups with clear CTAs.
- **Technical SEO:** On-page optimization, toxic backlink removal, advanced schema markup, and programmatic SEO architecture.
- **Custom AI & SaaS Tools:** Development of specialized client-side tools (e.g., AI watermark removers, viral image generators).

## Technical Capabilities & Philosophy
- **Architecture:** Static-First, Headless CMS, and Client-Side rendering.
- **Performance:** Sub-second load times (< 0.8s LCP), Core Web Vitals 90+ optimization.
- **Tech Stack:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS (Glassmorphism/Neomorphism UI), Solana Web3.js, Ethers.js, Cloudflare CDN.
- **Security:** Zero-database static architecture to prevent SQL injection and enhance global distribution.

## Key Projects & Portfolio
- **News Photo Card (Viral Generator):** [https://tools.cryptowebbuild.com/](https://tools.cryptowebbuild.com/)
- **$GIGA Solana (Meme Coin):** [https://giga-solana.pages.dev](https://giga-solana.pages.dev)
- **AutoGit Deployer (DevOps SaaS):** [https://autogithub.pages.dev](https://autogithub.pages.dev)
- **SolNova Protocol (Solana Presale):** [https://solnova.pages.dev](https://solnova.pages.dev)
- **ShopFast (Headless E-commerce):** [https://e-commercesagor.pages.dev/](https://e-commercesagor.pages.dev/)
- **BNB Quack Inu (Viral Meme Coin):** [https://quackmeme.pages.dev](https://quackmeme.pages.dev)
